description: Error categories emitted by kraken-cli. Agents should route on the error field, not message strings.

fields.error: Error category string (matches a category below)
fields.message: Human-readable error detail (not stable, do not parse)

categories.description: Kraken API returned an application-level error (insufficient funds, unknown pair, order minimum not met).
categories.agent_action: Log the error. Fix request parameters. Do not retry the same request.

categories.description: Authentication failed. API key invalid, expired, or lacks permissions.
Network-level failure. Request could not reach the Kraken API.
categories.agent_action: Retry with exponential backoff. Check connectivity.

categories.description: Throttled by Kraken's rate limiter. Spot uses counter/decay; Futures uses token bucket.
categories.agent_action: Wait 5-15 seconds, then retry. Reduce request frequency.

example_envelope.message: Rate limit exceeded: EAPI:Rate limit exceeded

categories.description: Input validation failed before the request was sent.
categories.agent_action: Fix input parameters. Check types, required fields, allowed values.

example_envelope.message: Validation error: Invalid URL: invalid authority

categories.description: Configuration error. Config file missing, malformed, or invalid.
categories.agent_action: Check config file. For agents, prefer environment variables.
Reconnect with backoff. CLI retries 3 times internally.

categories.description: Failed to parse API response. Response not valid JSON or unexpected structure.
categories.agent_action: Log raw response. Possible API change or maintenance. Do not retry.

example_envelope.message: Parse error: expected value at line 1 column 1
